meaning: n.大型有盖汤锅,酵母调味品,马麦脱酸酵母(商标名称)
examples: The taste of Marmite is comparable in some ways to soy sauce.
A letter from their legal and business department said: "Dear Ms Marmite Lover."
Lobster Benedict, Eggs Benedict, Breakfast Burgers, Egg & Marmite Soldiers, Salmon & Scrambled Eggs – more than a third of the nation (34%) have tried all these.
Former first minister Rhodri Morgan said she was a "Marmite" politician who divided opinions.
The Marmite factory was scheduled to re-open by middle of last year but faced unexpected delays.
